scripts.android: npm run qvac:sync-mobile-bundle && npm run hive:bundle && node scripts/android-install-device.mjs
scripts.android:install-device: npm run qvac:sync-mobile-bundle && npm run hive:bundle && node scripts/android-install-device.mjs
scripts.android:logs: adb logcat -v time ReactNativeJS:V ReactNative:V unknown:BridgelessReact:V unknown:ReactNative:V AndroidRuntime:E libc:E *:S
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/patchBareTlsAddon.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacHttpTimeoutRegistry.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacAndroidGpuBackend.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacLlmBatchConfig.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacNativePrebuild.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacLlmNativeLogging.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacExpoMobileBundleTemp.mjs && node scripts/patchQuickCryptoCmakeRegeneration.mjs
scripts.qvac:sync-mobile-bundle: node scripts/patchBareTlsAddon.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacHttpTimeoutRegistry.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacAndroidGpuBackend.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacLlmBatchConfig.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacNativePrebuild.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacLlmNativeLogging.mjs && node scripts/patchQvacExpoMobileBundleTemp.mjs && node scripts/patchQuickCryptoCmakeRegeneration.mjs && node scripts/sync-qvac-mobile-bundle.mjs
scripts.prebuild:android-clean: node scripts/cleanAndroidForPrebuild.mjs && npm run qvac:sync-mobile-bundle && npm run hive:bundle && npx expo prebuild --clean --platform android
scripts.android:prebuild-install: npm run prebuild:android-clean && npm run android:install-device
